verses.text: Who is greatest? Except ye 'become as little children, ye shall not enter.' Childlike humility. Greatness in the kingdom is lowliness, not rank.
Who is greatest? Except ye 'become as little children, ye shall not enter.' Childlike humility. Greatness in the kingdom is lowliness, not rank.
Who is greatest? Except ye 'become as little children, ye shall not enter.' Childlike humility. Greatness in the kingdom is lowliness, not rank.
Who is greatest? Except ye 'become as little children, ye shall not enter.' Childlike humility. Greatness in the kingdom is lowliness, not rank.
To receive such a child is to receive Christ; but woe to him who offends 'one of these little ones.' Care for the weak. To cause a believer to stumble is a grievous sin.
To receive such a child is to receive Christ; but woe to him who offends 'one of these little ones.' Care for the weak. To cause a believer to stumble is a grievous sin.
To receive such a child is to receive Christ; but woe to him who offends 'one of these little ones.' Care for the weak. To cause a believer to stumble is a grievous sin.
If hand or eye offend, cut it off; better to enter life maimed than be cast into hell. Decisive war. Sin must be cut away whatever the cost.
If hand or eye offend, cut it off; better to enter life maimed than be cast into hell. Decisive war. Sin must be cut away whatever the cost.
Despise not these little ones; their angels behold the Father's face; the Son of man came 'to save that which was lost.' Watched over. Heaven honours the lowliest of God's children.
Despise not these little ones; their angels behold the Father's face; the Son of man came 'to save that which was lost.' Watched over. Heaven honours the lowliest of God's children.
The shepherd leaves the ninety-nine to seek one straying sheep; your Father wills 'that one of these little ones should... perish' not. Seeking love. God's heart goes after every wanderer.
The shepherd leaves the ninety-nine to seek one straying sheep; your Father wills 'that one of these little ones should... perish' not. Seeking love. God's heart goes after every wanderer.
The shepherd leaves the ninety-nine to seek one straying sheep; your Father wills 'that one of these little ones should... perish' not. Seeking love. God's heart goes after every wanderer.
If thy brother trespass, tell him alone; then with witnesses; then the church. Patient correction. Restoring a brother is done step by careful step.
If thy brother trespass, tell him alone; then with witnesses; then the church. Patient correction. Restoring a brother is done step by careful step.
If thy brother trespass, tell him alone; then with witnesses; then the church. Patient correction. Restoring a brother is done step by careful step.
What ye bind on earth is bound in heaven; 'where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I.' Christ present. The smallest gathering in His name has His company.
What ye bind on earth is bound in heaven; 'where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I.' Christ present. The smallest gathering in His name has His company.
What ye bind on earth is bound in heaven; 'where two or three are gathered together in my name, there am I.' Christ present. The smallest gathering in His name has His company.
How oft forgive? Not seven times, but 'until seventy times seven.' Boundless pardon. Forgiveness is to know no limit.
How oft forgive? Not seven times, but 'until seventy times seven.' Boundless pardon. Forgiveness is to know no limit.
A king forgives a servant ten thousand talents, moved with compassion at his plea. Great mercy. God remits a debt we could never pay.
A king forgives a servant ten thousand talents, moved with compassion at his plea. Great mercy. God remits a debt we could never pay.
A king forgives a servant ten thousand talents, moved with compassion at his plea. Great mercy. God remits a debt we could never pay.
A king forgives a servant ten thousand talents, moved with compassion at his plea. Great mercy. God remits a debt we could never pay.
A king forgives a servant ten thousand talents, moved with compassion at his plea. Great mercy. God remits a debt we could never pay.
But that servant chokes a fellow over a hundred pence and casts him into prison. Hard heart. The forgiven shows no mercy to another.
But that servant chokes a fellow over a hundred pence and casts him into prison. Hard heart. The forgiven shows no mercy to another.
But that servant chokes a fellow over a hundred pence and casts him into prison. Hard heart. The forgiven shows no mercy to another.
His lord, angered, delivers him to the tormentors for showing no mercy. Mercy required. The pardoned must pardon, or forfeit their pardon.
His lord, angered, delivers him to the tormentors for showing no mercy. Mercy required. The pardoned must pardon, or forfeit their pardon.
His lord, angered, delivers him to the tormentors for showing no mercy. Mercy required. The pardoned must pardon, or forfeit their pardon.
His lord, angered, delivers him to the tormentors for showing no mercy. Mercy required. The pardoned must pardon, or forfeit their pardon.
'So... shall my heavenly Father do also unto you, if ye... forgive not.' Solemn close. An unforgiving heart cannot keep God's forgiveness.
